nasb.text: When the Gentiles heard this, they began rejoicing and glorifying the word of the Lord; and as many as had been appointed to eternal life believed.

esv.text: And when the Gentiles heard this, they began rejoicing and glorifying the word of the Lord, and as many as were appointed to eternal life believed.

cnv.text: 外族人聽見了就歡喜，讚美主的道，凡指定得永生的都信了。

ccb.text: 外族人听后，非常欢喜，颂赞主的道。凡被选定得永生的人都信了主。

csbs.text: 外邦人听了这话就感到欢喜，不住地荣耀主的福音，凡是被预定进入永恒生命的人都信了。
